mapper.select: SELECT b.`id`, b.`isbn`, b.`title`, b.`author`, b.`publisher`, b.`publish_date`, b.`total_quantity`, b.`status`, b.`is_recommended`, b.`recommend_reason`, b.`price`, b.`created_at`, GROUP_CONCAT(c.`name` SEPARATOR ', ') AS `category_name` FROM `dodamdodam`.`books` AS b LEFT JOIN `dodamdodam`.`book_categories` bc ON b.`id` = bc.`book_id` LEFT JOIN `dodamdodam`.`categories` c ON bc.`category_id` = c.`id` GROUP BY b.`id`, b.`isbn`, b.`title`, b.`author`, b.`publisher`, b.`publish_date`, b.`total_quantity`, b.`status`, b.`is_recommended`, b.`recommend_reason`, b.`price`, b.`created_at` ORDER BY b.`created_at` DESC

SELECT b.`id`, b.`title`, b.`author`, b.`total_quantity`, COUNT(CASE WHEN bc.`status` = 'AVAILABLE' THEN 1 END) AS `available_quantity` FROM `dodamdodam`.`books` AS b LEFT JOIN `dodamdodam`.`book_copies` bc ON b.`id` = bc.`book_id` GROUP BY b.`id`, b.`title`, b.`author`, b.`total_quantity`, b.`created_at` ORDER BY b.`created_at` DESC

SELECT b.`id`, b.`isbn`, b.`title`, b.`author`, b.`publisher`, b.`publish_date`, b.`total_quantity`, b.`status`, b.`created_at`, b.`cover_image`, GROUP_CONCAT(c.`name` SEPARATOR ', ') AS `category_name`, COUNT(CASE WHEN bcp.`status` = 'AVAILABLE' THEN 1 END) AS `available_quantity` FROM `dodamdodam`.`books` AS b LEFT JOIN `dodamdodam`.`book_categories` bc ON b.`id` = bc.`book_id` LEFT JOIN `dodamdodam`.`categories` AS c ON bc.`category_id` = c.`id` LEFT JOIN `dodamdodam`.`book_copies` AS bcp ON b.`id` = bcp.`book_id`
b.`title` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
b.`author` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
b.`isbn` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
b.`title` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.`author` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.`isbn` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.`publisher` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
GROUP BY b.`id`, b.`isbn`, b.`title`, b.`author`, b.`publisher`, b.`publish_date`, b.`total_quantity`, b.`status`, b.`created_at`, b.`cover_image` ORDER BY b.`created_at` DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT b.`id`, b.`title`, b.`author`, b.`total_quantity`, COUNT(CASE WHEN bc.`status` = 'AVAILABLE' THEN 1 END) AS `available_quantity` FROM `dodamdodam`.`books` AS b LEFT JOIN `dodamdodam`.`book_copies` bc ON b.`id` = bc.`book_id` WHERE REPLACE(b.`title`, ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', REPLACE(#{keyword}, ' ', ''), '%') OR REPLACE(b.`author`, ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', REPLACE(#{keyword}, ' ', ''), '%') GROUP BY b.`id`, b.`title`, b.`author`, b.`total_quantity`, b.`created_at` ORDER BY b.`created_at` DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT b.`id`) FROM `dodamdodam`.`books` AS b WHERE REPLACE(b.`title`, ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', REPLACE(#{keyword}, ' ', ''), '%') OR REPLACE(b.`author`, ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', REPLACE(#{keyword}, ' ', ''), '%')

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT b.`id`) FROM `dodamdodam`.`books` AS b LEFT JOIN `dodamdodam`.`book_categories` bc ON b.`id` = bc.`book_id` LEFT JOIN `dodamdodam`.`categories` AS c ON bc.`category_id` = c.`id`
b.`title` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
b.`author` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
b.`isbn` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
b.`title` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.`author` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.`isbn` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.`publisher` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

SELECT b.`id`, b.`isbn`, b.`title`, b.`author`, b.`publisher`, b.`publish_date`, b.`total_quantity`, b.`status`, b.`is_recommended`, b.`recommend_reason`, b.`price`, b.`created_at`, GROUP_CONCAT(c.`name` SEPARATOR ', ') AS `category_name` FROM `dodamdodam`.`books` AS b LEFT JOIN `dodamdodam`.`book_categories` bc ON b.`id` = bc.`book_id` LEFT JOIN `dodamdodam`.`categories` c ON bc.`category_id` = c.`id` GROUP BY b.`id`, b.`isbn`, b.`title`, b.`author`, b.`publisher`, b.`publish_date`, b.`total_quantity`, b.`status`, b.`is_recommended`, b.`recommend_reason`, b.`price`, b.`created_at` ORDER BY b.`created_at` DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT b.*, GROUP_CONCAT(c.name) AS categoryName, COUNT(bc2.book_id) AS availableQuantity FROM `dodamdodam`.`books` b LEFT JOIN `dodamdodam`.`book_categories` AS bc ON b.`id` = bc.`book_id` LEFT JOIN `dodamdodam`.`categories` AS c ON bc.`category_id` = c.`id` LEFT JOIN `dodamdodam`.`book_copies` AS bc2 ON b.`id` = bc2.`book_id` AND bc2.`status` = 'AVAILABLE' WHERE bc.`category_id` = #{categoryId} GROUP BY b.`id` LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT b.`id`) FROM `dodamdodam`.`books` b LEFT JOIN `dodamdodam`.`book_categories` AS bc ON b.`id` = bc.`book_id` WHERE bc.`category_id` = #{categoryId}

SELECT b.`id`, b.`title`, b.`author`, b.`total_quantity`, COUNT(CASE WHEN bc.`status` = 'AVAILABLE' THEN 1 END) AS `available_quantity` FROM `dodamdodam`.`books` AS b LEFT JOIN `dodamdodam`.`book_copies` bc ON b.`id` = bc.`book_id` GROUP BY b.`id`, b.`title`, b.`author`, b.`total_quantity`, b.`created_at` ORDER BY b.`created_at` DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
